mapper.select: SELECT s.*, a.id as advisor_id, a.teacher_no as advisor_teacher_no, a.name as advisor_name, a.title as advisor_title, r.id as reviewer_id, r.teacher_no as reviewer_teacher_no, r.name as reviewer_name, r.title as reviewer_title, g.id as group_id, g.name as group_name, d.id as department_id, d.name as department_name, d.code as department_code FROM t_student s LEFT JOIN teacher a ON s.advisor_teacher_id = a.id LEFT JOIN teacher r ON s.reviewer_teacher_id = r.id LEFT JOIN defense_group g ON s.defense_group_id = g.id LEFT JOIN department d ON s.department_id = d.id WHERE s.id = #{id}

SELECT s.*, a.id as advisor_id, a.teacher_no as advisor_teacher_no, a.name as advisor_name, a.title as advisor_title, r.id as reviewer_id, r.teacher_no as reviewer_teacher_no, r.name as reviewer_name, r.title as reviewer_title, g.id as group_id, g.name as group_name, d.id as department_id, d.name as department_name, d.code as department_code FROM t_student s LEFT JOIN teacher a ON s.advisor_teacher_id = a.id LEFT JOIN teacher r ON s.reviewer_teacher_id = r.id LEFT JOIN defense_group g ON s.defense_group_id = g.id LEFT JOIN department d ON s.department_id = d.id

SELECT s.*, a.id as advisor_id, a.teacher_no as advisor_teacher_no, a.name as advisor_name, a.title as advisor_title, r.id as reviewer_id, r.teacher_no as reviewer_teacher_no, r.name as reviewer_name, r.title as reviewer_title, g.id as group_id, g.name as group_name, d.id as department_id, d.name as department_name, d.code as department_code FROM t_student s LEFT JOIN teacher a ON s.advisor_teacher_id = a.id LEFT JOIN teacher r ON s.reviewer_teacher_id = r.id LEFT JOIN defense_group g ON s.defense_group_id = g.id LEFT JOIN department d ON s.department_id = d.id WHERE s.department_id = #{departmentId} AND s.defense_year = #{year}

SELECT s.*, a.id as advisor_id, a.teacher_no as advisor_teacher_no, a.name as advisor_name, a.title as advisor_title, r.id as reviewer_id, r.teacher_no as reviewer_teacher_no, r.name as reviewer_name, r.title as reviewer_title, g.id as group_id, g.name as group_name, d.id as department_id, d.name as department_name, d.code as department_code FROM t_student s LEFT JOIN teacher a ON s.advisor_teacher_id = a.id LEFT JOIN teacher r ON s.reviewer_teacher_id = r.id LEFT JOIN defense_group g ON s.defense_group_id = g.id LEFT JOIN department d ON s.department_id = d.id WHERE s.defense_year = #{year}

SELECT s.*, a.id as advisor_id, a.teacher_no as advisor_teacher_no, a.name as advisor_name, a.title as advisor_title, r.id as reviewer_id, r.teacher_no as reviewer_teacher_no, r.name as reviewer_name, r.title as reviewer_title, g.id as group_id, g.name as group_name, d.id as department_id, d.name as department_name, d.code as department_code FROM t_student s LEFT JOIN teacher a ON s.advisor_teacher_id = a.id LEFT JOIN teacher r ON s.reviewer_teacher_id = r.id LEFT JOIN defense_group g ON s.defense_group_id = g.id LEFT JOIN department d ON s.department_id = d.id WHERE s.advisor_teacher_id = #{advisorId} AND s.defense_year = #{year}

SELECT s.*, a.id as advisor_id, a.teacher_no as advisor_teacher_no, a.name as advisor_name, a.title as advisor_title, r.id as reviewer_id, r.teacher_no as reviewer_teacher_no, r.name as reviewer_name, r.title as reviewer_title, g.id as group_id, g.name as group_name, d.id as department_id, d.name as department_name, d.code as department_code FROM t_student s LEFT JOIN teacher a ON s.advisor_teacher_id = a.id LEFT JOIN teacher r ON s.reviewer_teacher_id = r.id LEFT JOIN defense_group g ON s.defense_group_id = g.id LEFT JOIN department d ON s.department_id = d.id WHERE s.reviewer_teacher_id = #{reviewerId} AND s.defense_year = #{year}

SELECT s.*, a.id as advisor_id, a.teacher_no as advisor_teacher_no, a.name as advisor_name, a.title as advisor_title, r.id as reviewer_id, r.teacher_no as reviewer_teacher_no, r.name as reviewer_name, r.title as reviewer_title, g.id as group_id, g.name as group_name, d.id as department_id, d.name as department_name, d.code as department_code FROM t_student s LEFT JOIN teacher a ON s.advisor_teacher_id = a.id LEFT JOIN teacher r ON s.reviewer_teacher_id = r.id LEFT JOIN defense_group g ON s.defense_group_id = g.id LEFT JOIN department d ON s.department_id = d.id WHERE s.defense_group_id = #{groupId}

SELECT s.*, a.id as advisor_id, a.teacher_no as advisor_teacher_no, a.name as advisor_name, a.title as advisor_title, r.id as reviewer_id, r.teacher_no as reviewer_teacher_no, r.name as reviewer_name, r.title as reviewer_title, g.id as group_id, g.name as group_name, d.id as department_id, d.name as department_name, d.code as department_code FROM t_student s LEFT JOIN teacher a ON s.advisor_teacher_id = a.id LEFT JOIN teacher r ON s.reviewer_teacher_id = r.id LEFT JOIN defense_group g ON s.defense_group_id = g.id LEFT JOIN department d ON s.department_id = d.id WHERE s.student_no = #{studentNo} AND s.defense_year = #{year}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_student (student_no, name, class_info, department_id, defense_year, defense_type, title, summary) VALUES (#{studentNo}, #{name}, #{classInfo}, #{departmentId}, #{defenseYear}, #{defenseType}, #{title}, #{summary})
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT defense_year FROM t_student WHERE defense_year IS NOT NULL ORDER BY defense_year DESC
